name: OneWater Marine Inc.
business: OneWater Marine Inc. sells new and pre-owned recreational boats, finance and insurance products, repair and maintenance services, and marine parts and accessories. It serves consumers, boat manufacturers, distributors, big box retailers, and online customers through 95 dealerships and multiple online marketplaces.

exposures.sentence: We offer a wide array of new boats at various price points through relationships with over 35 manufacturers covering more than 50 brands.
We also assist our customers with obtaining property and casualty insurance.
We intend to expand our online presence and sales through digital platforms to engage in online new and pre-owned boat sales, parts and accessories as well as financing & insurance.

Ocean Bio-Chem is principally engaged in the manufacture, marketing, and distribution of a broad line of appearance, performance and maintenance products for the marine, automotive, power sports, recreational vehicle, home care and outdoor power equipment markets, under the Star brite and Star Tron brand names.

We are subject to risks associated with international trade policies, including tariffs and other restrictions, which could increase our costs, disrupt our supply chain, or otherwise adversely affect our business, financial condition and results of operations.

tamClaims.claim: Consumer spending in the United States on boats, engines, services, parts, accessories and related purchases reached $55.6 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Consumer spending in the United States on boats, engines, services, parts, accessories and related purchases reached $55.6 billion in 2024, down 2.6% from 2023, and has, on average, grown 5% annually since 2012.

tamClaims.claim: New powerboat sales reached $15.5 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: New powerboat sales have driven market growth and reached $15.5 billion in 2024, resulting in an 10% average annual growth rate since 2012.

tamClaims.claim: Pre-owned traditional powerboat sales were approximately $9.7 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Pre-owned traditional powerboat sales were approximately $9.7 billion in 2024, which represents a decrease of 5.6% compared to 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 895,000 powerboats were sold in the United States in 2024, with 81% pre-owned.
tamClaims.sentence: Of the approximately 895,000 powerboats sold in the United States in 2024, 81% of total units sold (approximately 728,000) were pre-owned.
